definition.description: Input wrapper for filtering allocated IP addresses for PoP locations.
Filter options for querying allocated IP addresses for PoP locations.

description.description: Filter by description of the allocated IP.
description.name: description

global.description: Free-text search across allocated IP attributes.
global.name: global

subnet.description: Filter by subnet associated with the allocated IP address, when applicable.
subnet.name: subnet

definition.name: PopLocationAllocatedIpFilterInput
PopLocationAllocatedIpInput

country.description: Filters PoPs based on their geographical country. Useful for regional filtering or compliance.
country.name: country

interconnectTagging.description: Filter by setting - cloud interconnect tags (e.g.,1Q or QinQ).
interconnectTagging.name: interconnectTagging

isPrivate.description: Filters based on whether a PoP is private or public and a part of the Cato Cloud (public or reserved for a specific partner/customer).
isPrivate.name: isPrivate

name.description: Filter by name of the PoP Location, usually represented by the city.
name.name: name

primary.description: Filters for PoPs marked as “primary,” likely signifying main or preferred locations in a geographic area.
primary.name: primary

siteLicenseRegion.description: Filters PoPs based on regional licensing rules or designations, possibly aligning with regional compliance or pricing.
siteLicenseRegion.name: siteLicenseRegion

definition.description: Input wrapper for filtering allocated IP addresses for PoP locations.
Filter options for querying allocated IP addresses for PoP locations.

description.description: Filter by description of the allocated IP.
description.name: description

global.description: Free-text search across allocated IP attributes.
global.name: global

subnet.description: Filter by subnet associated with the allocated IP address, when applicable.
subnet.name: subnet

definition.name: PopLocationAllocatedIpFilterInput
PopLocationAllocatedIpInput

allocatedIpList.description: Returns a paginated list of allocated IP addresses for PoP locations, with optional filters.
allocatedIpList.name: allocatedIpList

definition.description: Response payload for the allocated IP list query.

allocatedIp.description: List of allocated IP addresses that match the filter.
allocatedIp.name: allocatedIp

definition.description: A reference identifying the Account object. ID: Unique Account Identifier, Name: The Account Name
definition.name: AccountRef

definition.description: A reference identifying the PopLocation object. ID: Unique PopLocation Identifier, Name: The PopLocation Name
definition.name: PopLocationRef

paging.description: Paging information for the allocated IP list.
paging.name: paging

definition.name: PopLocationAllocatedIpPayload

country.description: Filters PoPs based on their geographical country. Useful for regional filtering or compliance.
country.name: country

interconnectTagging.description: Filter by setting - cloud interconnect tags (e.g.,1Q or QinQ).
interconnectTagging.name: interconnectTagging

isPrivate.description: Filters based on whether a PoP is private or public and a part of the Cato Cloud (public or reserved for a specific partner/customer).
isPrivate.name: isPrivate

name.description: Filter by name of the PoP Location, usually represented by the city.
name.name: name

primary.description: Filters for PoPs marked as “primary,” likely signifying main or preferred locations in a geographic area.
primary.name: primary

siteLicenseRegion.description: Filters PoPs based on regional licensing rules or designations, possibly aligning with regional compliance or pricing.
siteLicenseRegion.name: siteLicenseRegion

items.description: The actual list of PoP locations matching the given filter criteria. Each entry is a non-null PopLocation object.
items.name: items

cloudInterconnect.description:
Lists the available cloud interconnect options (e.g., AWS Direct Connect, Azure ExpressRoute) at this PoP.
Each entry in the list is a PopLocationCloudInterconnect object describing interconnect capabilities.
cloudInterconnect.name: cloudInterconnect

country.description: Reference to the country where the PoP resides. Links to a CountryRef object that may contain name, ISO code, or additional geopolitical metadata
country.name: country

definition.description: A reference identifying the Country object. ID: Unique Country Identifier, Name: The Country Name
definition.name: CountryRef

displayName.description: User-facing name of the PoP (e.g., for dashboards or UI displays). Often formatted for readability
displayName.name: displayName

id.description: Unique identifier for the PoP location. Globally unique across the Cato platform
id.name: id

isPrivate.description: indicates whether the PoP is a private location (customer-owned or dedicated) as opposed to part of the public/shared Cato cloud
isPrivate.name: isPrivate

name.description: Internal name of the PoP location, used for system-level identification. Usually the city of the PoP
name.name: name
